name: Tool Directory Structure
description: Tools live in src/tools/<ToolName>/ directories. Each tool has self-contained implementation, input schema (Zod), permissions, and execution logic. Tool.ts (~29K lines) is the base.
parseTextToolCalls() in ollamaClient.ts didn't recognize <tool_call>[{name, arguments}]</tool_call> format used by fine-tuned models. Model output was treated as plain text instead of tool calls.
resolution: Added Pattern 3 to parseTextToolCalls() that extracts tool calls from <tool_call> blocks containing JSON arrays with {name, arguments} objects.

description: Ollama stream() suppressed native tools unless OLLAMA_NATIVE_TOOLS=true, while complete() always sent tools.
resolution: Use shared native-tool selection logic so both complete() and stream() auto-enable native tools for supported models, with explicit env override.
